## Checklist

- [ ] My workflow uses **Claude (Anthropic)** as the AI/LLM node
- [ ] Workflow name follows format: `Feature Name (Claude)`
- [ ] All credential IDs replaced with `YOUR_*_CREDENTIAL_ID` placeholders
- [ ] `meta` field includes `description`, `llm`, and `author`
- [ ] Workflow JSON is valid (no syntax errors)
- [ ] I have tested this workflow on a live n8n instance
- [ ] README updated with workflow description (if adding new workflow)
